data.title: Zelle weighs stablecoin integration to expand its trillion-dollar payments network abroad
data.description:
Early Warning Services, which operates Zelle, has launched an initiative designed to explore international transfers using stablecoin technology.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/376092/zelle-weighs-stablecoin-integration-expand-trillion-dollar-payments-network-abroad?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: pump.fun acquires trading terminal Padre; PADRE tokens will no longer be used on the platform
data.description: pump.fun announced the acquisition of trading terminal Padre for an undisclosed amount. The announcement stated that following the acquisition, Padre will continue to operate as usual, including token trading on every launchpad and decentralized exchange on Solana, BNB Chain, Ethereum L1, and Base. The PADRE token will no longer be used on the platform, and there are no further plans for its future use. pump.fun stated that the acquisition will enhance the pump.fun user experience.

data.title: AI predicts Bitcoin price for Halloween 2025
data.description:
So far, “Uptober” has not been living up to its name this year, and Finbold’s AI prediction agent suggests that Bitcoin (BTC) is likely to slip even further by Halloween. The crypto is currently trading at around $111,280, having suffered a monthly drop of 1.48% as a result of mounting selling pressure and weakening institutional flows.  BTC 1-month price chart
source: https://finbold.com/ai-predicts-bitcoin-price-for-halloween-2025/

data.title: Tom Lee and Peter Brandt Issue Stark Bitcoin Warning — “50% Crash Still on the Table”
data.description:
Bitcoin analysts Tom Lee and Peter Brandt warn of a possible 50% correction despite record ETF inflows. Here’s why fears of a Bitcoin crash are rising.

The post Tom Lee and Peter Brandt Issue Stark Bitcoin Warning — “50% Crash Still on the Table” first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: Swedish listed company Fragbite Group has increased its Bitcoin holdings to 28.88
data.description: According to BitcoinTreasuries.NET, Swedish listed company Fragbite Group has purchased an additional 4 Bitcoins and now holds a total of 28.88 Bitcoins.

data.description:
JPMorgan upgraded Coinbase (COIN) to “overweight” and raised its price target to $404, citing major upside from a potential Base token and USDC yield expansion.

The post JPMorgan Predicts $404 Coinbase Rally as Base Token Hype Grows first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: After Binance Wallet added the "x402" listing to its market section, PING's market capitalization surged past $42 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, PING’s price surged past a market capitalization of $42 million, with a short-term increase of over 20%, influenced by the addition of the “x402” listing in the Binance Wallet market section.

data.title: U.S. Government Transfers Seized OCEAN Tokens
data.description: According to Foresight News, the U.S. government has recently transferred OCEAN tokens valued at $36, which were confiscated from Alameda two years ago. The movement of these digital assets was detected by Arkham, a blockchain monitoring service. This transfer marks a significant development in the handling of seized cryptocurrency assets by the authorities.

data.title: Binance Wallet Market Section Adds "x402" Listing
data.description: According to official news, x402 listings have been added to the Binance Wallet Market section. Users can now discover and seamlessly trade the latest tokens by navigating to the Markets tab in Binance Wallet.

data.title: Bitcoin OG deposits 100 BTC and 326 million USDC to Kraken and Binance respectively
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the early Bitcoin holder address (1011short) deposited another 100 BTC worth US$11.1 million to Kraken and deposited 326 million USDC to Binance.

data.title: A whale sold 4,708 ETH bought two months ago, losing $2.67 million
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale sold 4,708 ETH ($18.8 million) bought two months ago - losing $2.67 million.

data.title: The US September CPI was slightly lower than expected, and the three major US stock indexes opened higher
data.description: At the opening bell, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.54%, the S&P 500 rose 0.7%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.86%. Intel (INTC.O) opened up 6.8%, following overnight earnings reports showing a return to profitability in the third quarter, a return to revenue growth, and optimistic revenue guidance. Procter & Gamble (PG.N) rose 3.5%, with first-quarter results beating expectations. (Jinshi)

data.title: Swiss pure Bitcoin investment app Relai receives EU license under MiCA
data.description: Relai, a Swiss pure-play Bitcoin investment app, has become the latest Crypto Asset Service Provider (CASP) to be approved under the EU's crypto asset regulatory framework. Official records show that the French financial markets regulator, the Autorité des marchés financiers (AMF), issued Relai a Markets in Crypto Assets (MiCA) license on Thursday. Founded in Zurich in 2020, Relai operates a pure Bitcoin platform that offers Bitcoin buying, selling, and storage services, using a self-custodial approach that allows users full control over their assets. The MiCA license allows Relai to launch a number of regulated services related to Bitcoin investments on its app. With this license, Relai is authorized to support Single Euro Payments Area (SEPA) payments within the EU and offer higher limits on Euro transactions. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 110,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.60% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 24, 2025, 14:25 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 110,000 USDT and is now trading at 109,906.320313 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.60% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Crypto.com files for national trust bank charter with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency
data.description: Crypto.com announced that it has filed an application for a national trust bank charter with the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to advance its industry-leading custody technology and related client services, including custody and staking of assets across various blockchain and digital asset protocols, including Cronos. This filing will not impact the ongoing operations and client services of Crypto.com Custody Trust Company, a qualified custodian for non-depository trust companies regulated by the New Hampshire Department of Banking.

data.title: Aster: Plans to use 70-80% of S3 fees for ASTER repurchases, the specific allocation will depend on market conditions
data.description: Aster announced that its current goal is to allocate 70-80% of S3 fees to ASTER token buybacks. The specific allocation will depend on market conditions, and the final results will be announced after S3 concludes. The team stated that as a growing project, maintaining operational flexibility is crucial in the current uncertain market environment. Subsequent quarterly airdrops and buybacks will be announced separately once details are finalized.

data.title: The White House: It may not be possible to release inflation data next month, which would be the first time in history
data.description: The White House's Rapid Response 47 account posted that the White House has learned that next month may be the first month in history where no inflation data will be released. The Democratic-led government shutdown has prevented investigators from conducting their work in the field, preventing us from obtaining critical data. The economic impact could be severe. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Inflation Rate for October Meets Expectations
data.description: According to PANews, the final expected annual inflation rate for October in the United States stands at 4.6%. This figure aligns with both the forecast and the previous value, which were also set at 4.6%. The consistency in these numbers indicates stability in inflation expectations for the period.
